device_name: X100 with Full Field Peripheral Blood Smear (PBS) Application
intended_use: The X100 with Full Field Peripheral Blood Smear Application is intended to locate and display images of white cells, red cells, and platelets acquired from fixed and stained peripheral blood smears an
intended_use_full: The X100 with Full Field Peripheral Blood Smear Application is intended to locate and display images of white cells, red cells, and platelets acquired from fixed and stained peripheral blood smears and assists a qualified technologist in conducting a WBC differential, RBC morphology evaluation, and platelet estimate using those images. For in vitro diagnostic use only. For professional use only.
target_condition: Evaluation of blood cell morphology in peripheral blood smears for hematologic assessment
ground_truth: Manual light microscope examination by trained examiners using Romanowsky stain
other_metrics: WBC correlation coefficients: Neutrophil r=98%, Lymphocyte r=96%, Monocyte r=95%, Eosinophil r=98%; WBC Morphological Abnormality efficiency 96.82%, sensitivity 85.46%, specificity 97.79%; WBC Distributional Abnormality efficiency 95.75%, sensitivity 88.83%, specificity 97.43%; RBC Morphology overall agreement 99.77%; Platelet estimation correlation r=94%, efficiency 94.89%, sensitivity 90.00%, specificity 96.28%
